_provenance: Project-owned vetted Lever slug list (Phase 6). Each slug was verified against https://api.lever.co/v0/postings/{slug}?mode=json (HTTP 200 with a non-empty postings array) on the verified_at date. Additions are code changes: verify the endpoint by hand, update verified_at, and review in a PR. This list is never fetched from a remote source at run time.
